detail.description:
Invincible: Guarding the Globe is an idle hero squad RPG set in the Invincible world featuring an epic story never seen in the Invincible comics or Amazon Prime Video series, with graphic multi battle action, character collection, team management, idle features and, of course, super-powered visuals.

THE WORLD OF INVINCIBLE
Accompany the highly rated Amazon Prime Video animation with the first idle mobile RPG in the world of Invincible.
Become the hero in this epic campaign featuring an original

- A new threat just arrived: Face the infamous Lizard League soldiers
- A new GDA Case File is available now: Explore the mystical story of Seance Dog
